title: Creamy Chicken Italian Dinner
description: A classic Italian-inspired dinner featuring chicken breast in a creamy sauce, served with pasta.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the chicken breast and cook for 5-6 minutes, until browned and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the heavy cream and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the cream simmer for 2-3 minutes, until slightly thickened.
Stir in the parmesan cheese until melted and smooth.
Return the chicken to the skillet and toss to coat with the creamy sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the chicken and sauce over the cooked pasta, garnished with basil leaves.
